narrative:
Reminderville B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,139 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points.
